name: Sweet and Sour Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salt, pepper, flour, and ginger in a shallow dish.
2. Dip each pork chop into the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. In a deep skillet, heat butter and oil over high heat.
4. Brown the chops on both sides until golden brown.
5. Add onions and garlic to the skillet; cook over medium heat until soft.
6. Pour off excess fat from the skillet.
7. Stir in beef broth, chili sauce, vinegar, and brown sugar.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer for 45 minutes or until the pork chops are tender.
9. Check periodically and add more beef broth if necessary.
